covers: held-task front self-limit (task-spor-queue-front-loop-self-limit-on-held-tasks): an open task with rising front + a non-resolving inbound outcome (a decision via decided-in — a real work product, not a bare reference) + no live blocker damps its front to 0 in the score and suggests triage, not do; a sibling task with equal front but no outcome keeps the full front boost and stays do
